name: yield-intel
title: Yield Intelligence
summary: AI-powered read-only DeFi yield analysis with an attested decision log. Ranks your positions by AI score with per-item rationale; logs intended actions as signed receipts anchored to 0G Storage. Deliberately NO automated execution — this kit is an analysis + audit tool, not a trading bot. Testnet-default (OG_NETWORK=galileo); mainnet and automated execution are intentionally out of scope.

env.note: 0G network to use. Defaults to galileo (testnet). Mainnet and automated execution are INTENTIONALLY OUT OF SCOPE for this kit.
Operator private key for signing decision receipts and 0G Storage transactions
Model for yield analysis inference (optional — uses provider default if omitted)
